title: Apple finally brings back card payments for subscriptions and App Store purchases in India
snippet: Apple has resumesdcard payments for App Store purchases in India after a four-year hiatus. Initially, only Visa and Mastercard will be accepted.&nbsp;

title: Apple could bring back its iPhone X playbook for the iPhone Ultra
snippet: Apple could be planning to use the iPhone X playbook with the iPhone Ultra by delaying the initial pre-sales and orders for the foldable iPhone.

title: New AI agent can hack systems and deploy ransomware without human help
snippet: A new report reveals that AI agents can autonomously execute ransomware attacks, evidenced by the case of JADEPUFFER, which exploited a critical vulnerability to infiltrate systems.&nbsp;

title: WhatsApp usernames: Will they make India's digital conversations safer or less trustworthy? Experts weigh in
snippet: As digital platforms evolve in India, the way people identify themselves online is clearly changing too. WhatsApp's move towards usernames is more than a feature update.

title: WhatsApp username row: Zoho's Arattai to disable username feature
snippet: Zoho's Arattai will remove its username-based account feature after the regulatory challenges faced by WhatsApp.&nbsp;

title: Meta spent billions on AI, but Zuckerberg says progress has been slower than expected: Report
snippet: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg acknowledged the shortcomings of the company's recent restructuring and the slow development of AI agents.

title: WhatsApp issues username FAQs amid govt scrutiny—Can someone find you with it? Could you be impersonated? Check details
snippet: Meta Platforms' messaging app WhatsApp has released detailed set of frequently asked questions (FAQs) for users on its new username feature following controversy over safety and security of the rollout.&nbsp;

title: Oppo Reno 16, Reno 16c launched in India: Check price, specs and more

snippet: Meta is developing a cloud infrastructure to sell AI computing access, competing with AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.&nbsp;

title: Cultfit files DRHP with Sebi to raise Rs 950 crore via fresh issue
snippet: The IPO will comprise a fresh issue of shares worth Rs 950 crore and an offer for sale of up to 178.6 million shares by existing investors and individual shareholders, according to the DRHP. The total offer size will be finalised after the price band is set.

title: China's booming gig economy masks job market pain, strains welfare system
snippet: His story is increasingly common in China, where tens of millions ​are shifting from formal employment into the gig economy as meagre unemployment insurance, record numbers of graduates and a shortage of jobs squeeze opportunities.

title: Inside Telegram’s leak economy; Flipkart employees’ latest windfall

title: Info Edge to acquire edtech platform Coding Ninjas

snippet: Something stinks in California’s climate policies.
